title: Li Dong's Great Work as a Zoo Keeper
passage: Hello! My name is Li Dong. I'm 27 years old. I love animals a lot and work in a zoo. Every day I take the train to the zoo. It takes me about 45 minutes to get to the zoo from my home. I have a cat at home. His name is Mimi. He is five years old. He is black and white. He lives with me for three years. He often sleeps on my sofa. Mimi likes to eat fish best. And he likes to watch fish. I use a computer screen saver with fish swimming everywhere. When Mimi sees it, he is happy. He thinks there are a lot of fish in my computer. So he walks around my computer and keeps watching the screen. Don't you think he is funny and cute?

questions.prompt: How far is it from Li Dong's home to the zoo?
What do you think of Mimi? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: I think Mimi is an extremely cute and clever cat.
Because he loves watching the virtual fish on the computer screen and thinks they are real.
His funny behavior brings great joy to his owner's life.
I think the cat is quite lazy and sleeps all day long.
Because he doesn't want to play with any toys or catch mice.
All in all, having a pet takes too much time and energy.
